name: Microsoft Viva Glint Employee Engagement API
what_it_does: Microsoft Viva Glint REST API for continuous employee listening and engagement analytics platform integrated with Microsoft 365. Enables AI agents to manage employee survey data export and engagement metric retrieval, handle eNPS and engagement score trend monitoring, access survey response data for people analytics integration, retrieve manager effectiveness and team-level engagement data, manage HRIS data synchronization for employee attribute and hierarchy data, handle engagement score segmentation by department, role, and tenure, access action planning and improvement tracking data, retrieve benchmark and industry comparison data for competitive positioning, manage survey schedule and distribution automation, and integrate engagement data with Microsoft Teams, Workday, and SAP SuccessFactors.
use_cases: Exporting engagement data to people analytics from HR data agents
Monitoring manager effectiveness from HRBP automation agents
Syncing engagement trends with workforce planning from strategy agents
Integrating Glint data with Microsoft 365 from workplace analytics agents
not_for: Non-Microsoft 365 environments without Azure AD integration
SMB HR without enterprise people analytics budget and complexity
Customer satisfaction management without employee engagement focus
best_when: An enterprise using Microsoft 365 and Viva Glint wants AI agents to automate engagement data export, manager effectiveness analysis, people analytics integration, and Microsoft ecosystem workflow automation.
avoid_when: PRIVACY RISK: Minimum group size enforcement is critical — Glint enforces thresholds but automated data exports must verify group size before surfacing segment data. Microsoft 365 tenant requirement limits to Microsoft ecosystem. Automated management decisions based on engagement scores require human review and organizational context.

auth.notes: Viva Glint uses Azure Active Directory OAuth 2.0 authentication. Microsoft 365 tenant required. Microsoft Graph API integration for organizational data. Documentation at learn.microsoft.com/viva/glint. Acquired LinkedIn Glint (2018, $1.5B). HRIS integration via SFTP or API for employee roster sync. No native webhooks. Power BI integration for visualization.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — included in Microsoft Viva suite or standalone annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Microsoft Viva ($12/user/month suite) or standalone; Microsoft 365 E3/E5 bundle pricing
pricing.notes: Redmond, Washington. LinkedIn Glint acquired by Microsoft (2018, $1.5B). Now Microsoft Viva Glint. Enterprise employee engagement market. Strong in Microsoft-centric enterprise customers. Integration with Microsoft Teams and Microsoft 365 ecosystem. Copilot for HR features being added. Competes with Workday Peakon and Culture Amp for enterprise continuous listening.

performance.rate_limits: Microsoft Graph API rate limits apply; documented in Graph API documentation

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY RISK: Minimum group size (5+ respondents) must be enforced before surfacing segment data; configure automated exports to check respondent count
Microsoft 365 dependency — Azure AD tenant required; authentication tied to Microsoft identity; no standalone non-Microsoft auth available
Microsoft Graph integration — organizational hierarchy and employee data flows through Microsoft Graph; understand Graph permission scopes before integrating
HRIS sync complexity — employee roster requires SFTP or API sync with HRIS; attribute mapping must match Glint's expected schema for proper segmentation
Viva suite context — Glint is part of Microsoft Viva; roadmap driven by Microsoft; verify current API availability as product evolves with Copilot integration
Power BI export — large-scale analytics are better served via Power BI export integration rather than direct API; real-time queries have performance limits
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employee engagement surveys. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, FedRAMP. Azure AD OAuth2. US/EU. Anonymized employee engagement and survey data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee engagement. SOC2, FedRAMP, GDPR. Azure AD OAuth2. US/EU. Employee survey and engagement data.
